side_effects.description: Insomnia is a side effect of Retatrutide; increased metabolic rate causes poor sleep quality, body and brain won't relax

protocol_notes: Reported personal experience that daily injections felt better than bolus injections once or twice weekly. Has had no success resolving insomnia with Retatrutide. Uses protein shakes with fruit (protein powder, almond/coconut milk, banana, berries, MCT oil, rice powder) for caloric intake (500-750 calories per shake).
